# App instructions

Project-scoped = short + specific.

Use this file as the caveman version of the workspace guidance.

| Rule | Guidance |
|---|---|
| Notes | bullets only |
| Docs | long refs go to README/docs |
| Dupes | keep one canonical version |
| Scope | workspace copy concise; project copy specific |
| Goal | preserve meaning, remove repetition |
| Review | shorten anything longer than the rule |

## Review hints

- Shorten any example longer than the rule.
- Remove duplicate guidance when possible.
- Keep only rules needed every time.
- If a detail is only needed once, do not keep it here.
